en.name: Level 69 — The Road Trip of Affliction
en.shortDescription: An infinite foggy highway where survival means never leaving your vehicle — something hunts whoever steps outside.
en.atmosphere: Perpetual darkness and thick fog swallow the endless highway; eerie silence broken by unseen threats above the abandoned cars.
en.tips: Never exit your vehicle. Drive toward tunnel exits perpendicular to the highway. Ration supplies — the trip can run long.
